title: Feature: Update external links without deleting them;

posts.author: narjoon (nick arjoon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

A great time saver would be the ability to edit links in columns.

Example: I’m a user who wanted to link to community.monday.com but I typed in community.sunday.com. Now, I have to click X to delete the entire link and then input the URL all over again along with community.monday.com.

The feature to edit a link would allow me to click a pencil instead of an X so I can change sunday>monday.

Happy Holidays!
